heading: Quarters: heat and light
label: 7593 Quarters: heat and light
text: The heat and light necessary for the authorized quarters of members of the Army shall be furnished at the expense of the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)459310:723.(1st proviso under “Quartermaster’s Department”), .Mar. 2, 1907, ch. 251134 Stat. 1167The word “members” is substituted for the words “officers and enlisted men”. The words “under such regulations as the Secretary of the Army may prescribe”, are omitted, since the Secretary has inherent authority to issue regulations appropriate to exercising his statutory function.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 4593 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019
